'''Space mines''', also known as '''orbital mines''' or simply '''mines''', were a type of [[mine]] used in [[Realspace|space]] [[Space warfare|warfare]]. An [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[TIE/sa tactical bomber|TIE/sa]] [[light bomber]] could carry up to six such mines in its main ordnance bay.<ref name="TIE model set" /> Space mines could range in size, from large explosives that could devastate the area around it, to smaller mines that could be attached to asteroids.<ref name="Battlefront II" /> The [[SJ-91 orbital mine]] was produced by [[ArmaTek]].<ref name="Comprehensive SWE">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia: The Comprehensive Guide to the Star Wars Galaxy]]''</ref> An Imperial minefield left over from the [[Galactic Civil War]] was used by the [[First Order]]<ref name="PD Annual" /> in [[34 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the events of [[Poe Dameron Annual 1|''Poe Dameron Annual'' 1]] to [[34 ABY]].</ref> They could be detonated by a bolt from a [[Glie-44 blaster pistol]].<ref name="PD Annual" />
